title: Cyan Visible Powdered Snow
description: Makes powdered snow blocks easy to see.
body:
## greenishlemon's cyan visible powdered snow
- This pack puts a nice cyan outline on all powdered snow blocks.
- This pack also adds a cyan outline to the snow in the powdered snow bucket.

I hope this helps some people.  See the [gallery ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyan-visible-p-snow/gallery) for some examples of what this pack does.

For the red version with a giant exclamation mark on it, [click here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/visible-p-snow).
